# Arlington Junk Removal

> Arlington Junk Removal is a local, full-service junk removal and hauling company based in Arlington, Texas, serving the DFW metroplex.

## About

Arlington Junk Removal provides fast, affordable junk removal services for residential and commercial customers in Arlington, TX and surrounding cities. We handle furniture removal, appliance removal, yard waste, construction debris, estate cleanouts, garage cleanouts, and commercial junk removal. We are locally owned and operated, licensed and insured, and offer same-day and next-day service. Our pricing is volume-based, starting at $150 for a quarter trailer load up to $900 for a full load.

## Contact

- Phone: (817) 705-6612
- Email: info@arlingtonjunkremovaltx.com
- Website: https://arlingtonjunkremovaltx.com
- Hours: Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM
- Location: Arlington, TX

## Service Areas

Arlington, Grand Prairie, Mansfield, Kennedale, Pantego, Dalworthington Gardens, Fort Worth (east and south), Hurst, Euless, Bedford, Irving

## Services

- Residential Junk Removal: /pages/residential-junk-removal.html
- Furniture & Appliance Removal: /pages/furniture-appliance-removal.html
- Yard Waste Removal: /pages/yard-waste-removal.html
- Construction Debris Removal: /pages/construction-debris-removal.html
- Estate Cleanouts: /pages/estate-cleanout.html
- Garage Cleanouts: /pages/garage-cleanout.html
- Commercial Junk Removal: /pages/commercial-junk-removal.html

## Pricing

- Quarter Load (approx 4 cubic yards): $150–$250
- Half Load (approx 8 cubic yards): $250–$400
- Three-Quarter Load (approx 12 cubic yards): $400–$600
- Full Load (approx 16 cubic yards): $600–$900

Pricing is based on volume. Free on-site estimates with no hidden fees.
